# {project} — Project Rules

## How to use with ULTRON

At session start, your AI assistant loads context automatically:
```
session_start("{project}", "claude-code")
```

During work, save knowledge as you go:
```
remember("{project}", "warning-key", "description", "warning")
decision("{project}", "topic", "choice", "reason")
task("{project}", "add", "what needs to be done")
```

At session end:
```
session_end("{project}", "claude-code", "what was done", ["files touched"])
```

## Efficiency Rules
<!-- From claude-token-efficient best practices -->

- Think before acting: read existing files before writing new code
- Favor targeted edits over full file rewrites
- Keep responses concise — code first, explanation only if non-obvious
- Run tests before declaring a task complete
- User instructions always override these rules
- Never invent file paths, function names, or API endpoints — verify first
- When a step fails, stop and report the error before attempting a fix
